maintenance_plans.name: Premium Care - 2020 Toyota Camry
maintenance_plans.description: Premium maintenance plan for 2020 Camry including full synthetic oil, brake inspections, and extended warranty coverage.

maintenance_plans.name: Light Truck & Fleet Basic

service_packages.name: Standard Oil Change
service_packages.description: Conventional oil change with new oil filter and a courtesy multi-point inspection.

service_packages.name: Full Synthetic Oil Change
service_packages.description: Full synthetic oil change with premium filter and extended life protection.

service_packages.name: High-Mileage Oil Change
service_packages.description: High-mileage oil formulated to help reduce leaks and oil consumption in older vehicles.

service_packages.name: Flat Tire / Puncture Repair
service_packages.description: Remove tire, inspect, patch or plug from inside where repairable, and remount tire.

service_packages.name: Flat Repair with Wheel Balance
service_packages.description: Flat repair plus computerized wheel balancing for a smoother ride.

service_packages.name: Engine Diagnostics / Check Engine Light
service_packages.description: Computer scan, code retrieval, and technician diagnosis for check engine light concerns.

service_packages.name: Advanced Engine Diagnostics
service_packages.description: Includes extended testing time and advanced oscilloscope/electrical diagnostics for complex issues.

service_packages.name: 30,000-Mile Maintenance
service_packages.description: Factory-recommended 30,000-mile service including oil change, filters, tire rotation, and comprehensive inspection.

service_packages.name: 30,000-Mile Maintenance Plus
service_packages.description: 30k service plus brake fluid exchange and cabin air filter replacement.

service_packages.name: Front Brake Pad Replacement
service_packages.description: Replace front brake pads, lubricate hardware, and perform brake system inspection.

service_packages.name: Front Brake Pad Replacement – Premium Ceramic
service_packages.description: Premium ceramic front brake pads with extended-life warranty and reduced brake dust.

service_packages.name: Front Brake Pad & Rotor Package
service_packages.description: Replacement of front brake pads and rotors as a bundled package to restore braking performance.

service_packages.name: Tire Rotation & Balance
service_packages.description: Rotate all four tires and perform computerized balancing to help extend tire life.

service_packages.name: Scheduled Service Bundle
service_packages.description: Bundle of oil change, tire rotation, and multi-point inspection at a discounted package price.

services.name: Standard Oil Change
services.description: Conventional oil change with new oil filter, fluid top-off, and a complimentary multi-point inspection.

services.name: Flat Tire Repair / Puncture Repair
services.description: Inspect tire, locate leak, repair with internal patch or plug where safe, and remount tire to wheel.

services.name: Engine Diagnostics / Check Engine Light
services.description: Scan onboard computer, retrieve diagnostic trouble codes, and perform technician testing for check engine light concerns.

services.name: 30,000-Mile Maintenance
services.description: Factory-recommended 30,000-mile service including oil and filter change, tire rotation, air filter inspection, and full vehicle inspection.

services.name: Front Brake Pad Replacement
services.description: Replace front brake pads, clean and lubricate slide pins and hardware, and measure rotor thickness for safety.

services.name: Front Brake Pad & Rotor Package
services.description: Bundled replacement of front brake pads and rotors to restore stopping performance and reduce brake pulsation.

services.name: Tire Rotation & Balance
services.description: Rotate all four tires and perform computerized wheel balancing to help maximize tire life and ride comfort.

services.name: Scheduled Service Bundle
services.description: Discounted bundle that combines an oil change, tire rotation, and multi-point inspection in a single visit.

services.name: Four-Wheel Alignment
services.description: Adjust wheel angles to manufacturer specifications to help prevent uneven tire wear and improve handling.

services.name: Battery Testing & Replacement
services.description: Test starting and charging system, replace battery if needed, and clean terminals and connections.

services.name: Coolant Flush & Fill
services.description: Drain and replace engine coolant, bleed cooling system, and inspect hoses and radiator for leaks.

services.name: A/C Performance Check
services.description: Inspect air conditioning system operation, measure vent temperature, and check for basic leaks or performance issues.
